title: Astral Building
description: An advanced construction utility mod. Introduces the Astral Building Nexus, granting players a localized creative-flight building state protected by a massive holographic world border.
body: # 🌌 Astral Building **The ultimate construction utility.** Say goodbye to scaffolding, tedious block-swapping, and phantom attacks while working on your megabuilds. Astral Building introduces the **Astral Building Nexus**, a technological marvel that grants you a localized, highly-protected creative flight zone in survival Minecraft. Designed to work flawlessly with **Astral Storage**, this mod turns massive base-building from a chore into an absolute dream. ## ✨ Key Features * **Localized Creative Flight:** Right-click the Nexus with an empty hand to launch into the air! You gain full creative flight within a massive 128x128x128 holographic building zone. * **Astral Storage Auto-Refill:** Never open a chest while building again. When placed near an Astral Chest, your hotbar stacks will automatically and instantly refill from the chest's 10-million-item database as you place blocks. * **Hostile Evacuation Zone:** Building at night is finally safe. The Nexus projects a continuous safety field—any hostile mobs that wander into your construction zone will immediately sprint away in terror. * **Holographic Forcefield:** See exactly where your building limits are with a lag-free, highly visible holographic world border, complete with custom glowing boundaries on the ceiling and floor. Dimensional Restriction: The Astral Building Nexus cannot be used in the Nether or the End. IT WILL EXPLODE ## 🛠️ Crafting Recipe The Astral Building Nexus contains immense magical and technological power, requiring some of the rarest materials in the game to craft. You will need the following items in a Crafting Table: * **Top Row:** Respawn Anchor | Ancient Debris | Respawn Anchor * **Middle Row:** Enchanting Table | Totem of Undying | Enchanting Table * **Bottom Row:** Phantom Membrane | Wither Skeleton Skull | Phantom Membrane ## ⚙️ Requirements * **Modloader:** Fabric * **Minecraft Version:** 1.20.1 * **Required Dependency 1:** [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) * **Required Dependency 2:** [Astral Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/astral-storage) ## 🐛 Issues & Feedback If you find any bugs or have suggestions for future updates, please feel free to leave a comment or open an issue on the project's GitHub page! *** _Created by KarmaManPy_
